# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('title', 'Comments')

@section('content')
<div class="container">
    <h2 class="mb-4">Comments</h2>

    @if(isset($comments) && $comments->count())
        <div class="comments">
            @foreach($comments as $comment)
                <article class="comment border rounded p-3 mb-3" id="comment-{{ $comment->id }}">
                    <header class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start mb-2">
                        <div class="comment-meta">
                            <strong class="comment-author">
                                {{ optional($comment->user)->name ?? ($comment->author_name ?? 'Anonymous') }}
                            </strong>
                            <div class="text-muted small">
                                <time datetime="{{ optional($comment->created_at)->toIso8601String() }}">
                                    {{ optional($comment->created_at)->format('M j, Y \a\t g:i A') }}
                                </time>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        @can('delete', $comment)
                            <form method="POST" action="{{ route('comments.destroy', $comment) }}" class="ms-3">
                                @csrf
                                @method('DELETE')
                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" onclick="return confirm('Delete this comment?')">
                                    Delete
                                </button>
                            </form>
                        @endcan
                    </header>

                    <div class="comment-body">
                        {!! $comment->content !!}
                    </div>

                    @if(!empty($comment->updated_at) && $comment->updated_at->gt($comment->created_at))
                        <footer class="text-muted small mt-2">
                            Edited <time datetime="{{ $comment->updated_at->toIso8601String() }}">{{ $comment->updated_at->format('M j, Y \a\t g:i A') }}</time>
                        </footer>
                    @endif
                </article>
            @endforeach
        </div>

        @if(method_exists($comments, 'links'))
            <div class="mt-4">
                {{ $comments->links() }}
            </div>
        @endif
    @else
        <p class="text-muted">No comments yet.</p>
    @endif
</div>
@endsection
